benchmark.objective: Benchmark end-to-end cybersecurity product research, definition, design, and frontend execution.

checks.detail: Configuration, frozen cycle membership, release sequence, hashes, and IDs are valid.
All 24 included runs are complete and have passing required audits; 2 completed runs remain excluded for rendering failures.
Frozen rubric, anonymized evidence, exact judge prompt hashes, one complete AI judge, and deterministic aggregate agree.
Desktop 1440x900 and mobile 375x812 evidence exists for every included run; runtime metadata is preserved.
Two classified publication-scope threads reconcile; harness token and cost counters are unavailable and remain null.
Interim release sequence, previous cycle link, canonical run route, report paths, and campaign-open status are present.

warnings: Token/cost accounting is structurally reconciled but unavailable because no harness transcript or stable session accounting record was exposed in the workspace.
Aggregate contains one AI judge; no human judge or multi-judge dispersion is available.
External deployment/publication is unavailable and is not attempted.

provenance.notes: Reviewed and consolidated from canonical benchmark, audit, evidence, judge, aggregate, and accounting artifacts. Scores and raw observations are copied; no new score arithmetic is introduced.
